title: Talking Villager
description: This mod adds a few sounds that lets your villager speak!
body:
This is a very small mod that only adds a few sounds for villagers, that make them sound like they are speaking english!
This is a just for fun project i made.
The mod can be used in modpacks and modified.
 
The mod has been tested on 1.19.2 (fabric) but it should work on some other versions aswell.
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb2270186ab2cf9fca2bc374b61f57b9196dca7e.png)
